nasb.text: Immediately coming up out of the water, He saw the heavens opening, and the Spirit like a dove descending upon Him;

esv.text: And when he came up out of the water, immediately he saw the heavens being torn open and the Spirit descending on him like a dove.

cnv.text: 他從水裡一上來，就看見天裂開了，聖靈仿佛鴿子降在他身上。

ccb.text: 耶稣从水中一上来，就看见天开了，圣灵好像鸽子一样降在祂身上，

csbs.text: 耶稣一从水里上来，就看见诸天裂开了，圣灵好像鸽子降临在他身上。
